overview: AITech Innovations is a founder-led UK digital growth systems agency for service businesses. It combines websites, content, advertising setup, chatbots and automation to help businesses generate and handle more enquiries.

service_pillars.name: Ads & Lead Generation
services: Initial audience, location or keyword targeting
service_pillars.scope: Setup and launch only. Ongoing monthly management is not included unless separately agreed. Results are not guaranteed.

positioning: Keep recommendations practical and commercially focused.
Prioritise trust, enquiry quality, speed and clear contact routes.
Do not invent customers, testimonials, performance claims or guaranteed outcomes.
Combined systems receive a custom quote after a free strategy call.
